name: KOPIN CORP
business: Kopin Corporation designs and manufactures microdisplays and optical subsystems for defense, industrial, medical, and consumer applications. Its products include AMLCD, LCOS, OLED, and MicroLED displays, as well as application-specific optical solutions (ASOS) and headsets. The company sells primarily to U.S. defense contractors and government agencies.

exposures.sentence: Our products are used for defense applications (soldier thermal weapon rifle sights, avionic fixed and rotary wing pilot helmets, armored vehicle targeting systems, and training & simulation headsets);
Medical: Targets surgeon headsets, allowing real-time visual aid during medical procedures, improving precision and efficiency.
Industrial: Focuses on 3D automated optical inspection (3D AOI) systems that use our displays as spatial light modulators.
Consumer: Includes recreational rifle scopes and potential AR/VR applications, with OLED and MicroLED displays being key for immersive experiences.
We design and manufacture a range of small form factor displays, including AMLCDs, LCOS displays, OLED displays, and are developing MicroLED displays.

The Company recently invented a fifth generation microdisplay architecture, NeuralDisplay which includes bi-directional, human-in-the-loop and AI-based algorithms resident within the backplane of the display.
Industrial: Focuses on 3D automated optical inspection (3D AOI) systems that use our displays as spatial light modulators.
Our microdisplays and ASOS to the U.S. Department of War for many years for solider centric systems, rotary and fixed wing aircraft

catalysts.event: $15.4M order for color MicroLED display manufacturing capability
catalysts.sentence: Kopin was awarded a transformative $15.4M order to develop sovereign manufacturing capability for color MicroLED displays on September 11, 2025.

catalysts.event: First production order for MicroLED displays for combat jet program
catalysts.sentence: the Company received several recurring awards for thermal weapon sight modules, training and simulation systems and displays and display modules for military pilot helmet HUD (head-up display) systems, including Kopin's first production order for MicroLED displays which has been qualified and will be deployed in a fielded combat jet program.

catalysts.event: Strategic investment and partnership with Theon International
catalysts.sentence: On October 16, 2025, the Company completed a $15 million strategic investment with Theon International Plc.
